scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd .. && (pip3 install -r server/requirements.txt || python3 -m pip install -r server/requirements.txt || echo 'pip install failed — Python highlight script will not run; see DEPLOYMENT.md')
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.ingest:docs: cd server && node scripts/ingestProgramDocs.js && cd .. && npm run highlight:docs
scripts.ingest:docs:force: cd server && node scripts/ingestProgramDocs.js --force && cd .. && npm run highlight:docs
